note: Seeded by Readiness (claude-yentl) from the 2026-06-19 full audit (docs/audit/2026-06-19/). Operator (codex-yentl) sole-writes this board going forward; Readiness owns docs/launch-gate/yentl-readiness-criteria.claude.json. Mailbox: agent-comms/yentl-mailbox.json. Identities are yentl-scoped to avoid consuming the concurrent Hamodia dualtrack mailbox. Owner decisions 2026-06-19: prep+deploy to stop prod 500s; build consent-gated diarization + re-measure; full consumer redesign for glanceability.

optional worker prep 2026-06-20T03:37Z: services/youtube-transcript-worker/worker.mjs implements the existing YENTL_YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT_WORKER_URL contract as a standalone Node service; no app production config or deploy was changed

worker contract: GET /?video_id=<11-char-id> with optional Authorization bearer token returns {transcript_segments:[{text,start,end,is_final,speaker_id}]} or {error:{code,message}}; /healthz returns {ok:true}

worker code: validates strict 11-character YouTube IDs before spawning yt-dlp, uses execFile with no shell, parses SRT with carousel dedupe, maps PRIVATE/NO_CAPTIONS/NETWORK_ERROR, and cleans temp dirs
worker docs: services/youtube-transcript-worker/README.md documents run command, token, YT_DLP_PATH, and response contract
